prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-ASRO-GEMSTONEKIT-6PC-BUN Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 6pc Gemstone Mining Dig Kit Geology, 5LB Rocks and Minerals Paydirt (Sift, Sort and Find Treasures) Description: Whether you’re a seasoned prospector or just getting started with mining and geology hobbies, the ASR Outdoor Gemstone Mining Kit comes with essential items to enjoy the thrill of sifting through paydirt and identifying precious minerals! Inside the kit, you’ll find a 5lb bag of assorted rough gemstones (Brazilian), an identification chart, a plastic sieve, a plastic trowel, a magnifying loupe, and a pair of tweezers.

Our gemstone bags include top-quality gemstones in a rough assortment, including but not limited to: Amazonite, Rough Amethyst, Carnelian, Citrine, Clear Quartz, Fuchsite, Labradorite, Pyrite, Moonstone, Rose Quartz, Sea Jasper, Smoky Quartz, Tiger Eye and more! We’ve also included a gemstone identification chart so you can easily identify the gems from your rough mix bags, making this a great tool for beginners.

We’ve added a high-quality, durable plastic classifying sifter so you can easily sift through your gemstones and paydirt. The sieve features a stackable design and comes with convenience handles to make sifting a breeze. We’ve also added a high-visibility orange trowel, a 3.5X magnification loupe and a pair of tweezers to assist with collecting and analyzing your findings. This is a great gift set idea for prospectors, gemstone enthusiasts, and kids who are studying geology! Search Terms: Geology gemstone dig kit fossils paleontology archeology mining science kits for kids age 5 to 8 crystals fools gold nature stones learning toys tools amethyst pyrite crystal outdoor gear family games kids birthday gift Features: - 6PC GEMSTONE PAYDIRT KIT - This ASR Outdoor Gemstone Mining Kit comes with essential items to enjoy the thrill of sifting through paydirt and identifying precious minerals: (1) 5 pound bag of assorted rough gemstone paydirt, a gemstone identification chart, a plastic sieve, a trowel, tweezers and a magnification loupe - TOP QUALITY GEMSTONES - In your paydirt, you’ll discover an assortment of rough gemstones like Amazonite, Rough Amethyst, Carnelian, Citrine, Clear Quartz, Fuchsite, Labradorite, Pyrite, Moonstone, Rose Quartz, Sea Jasper, Smoky Quartz, Tiger Eye and more - PLASTIC SAND SIFTER - The kit comes with a 9.75” x 9.75” classifying sieve ideal for sifting through your gemstones and paydirt. The sieve has 36 holes per square inch, comes with convenient handles, and is made of durable plastic ideal for use in any weather - IDENTIFICATION CHART - Included is a gemstone identification chart so you can easily identify the gems from your rough mix bags, and the chart is laminated so you can take it with you to identify precious gems out in the field - COLLECTION TOOLS - We’ve also added a durable, high-visibility trowel for digging and sifting, a pair of tweezers and a 3.5X magnification loupe for collecting and analyzing your findings === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6pc Gemstone Mining Dig Kit with 5LB Paydirt

tokens.name: Gemstone Mining Dig Kit with Paydirt

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6-pk 5lb Gemstone Mining Dig Kit

openai.title_differentiation: 5 Lb Assorted Rough Gemstones, Sieve And Trowel, 35X Loupe, Gem Identification Chart, Tweezers, Beginner Geology Fun
